introSection: Fairly Odd Coaster is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: On August 11, 2003, the park announced that it had purchased a new spinning roller coaster. At the time, it was called Timberland Twister. For the 2008 season, the roller coaster received its current name as the park was re-branded as Nickelodeon Universe.

fullText:
Fairly Odd Coaster is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, USA.

On August 11, 2003, the park announced that it had purchased a new spinning roller coaster. At the time, it was called Timberland Twister. For the 2008 season, the roller coaster received its current name as the park was re-branded as Nickelodeon Universe.
